title: Iron Legs
description: Intense lower body work with lateral lunges, single-leg hip thrust and plank

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Deep squat hold
exercises.instructions: Hold a deep squat, back straight, elbows against the knees

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Lateral lunges
exercises.instructions: Big lateral step, bend one leg, the other extended

exercises.name: Single-leg hip thrust
exercises.instructions: Hip thrust on one leg, the other in the air

exercises.name: 1.5 squats
exercises.instructions: Lower, come up halfway, lower again, come up fully

exercises.name: Hollow hold
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, arms and legs extended above the floor, lower back pinned

exercises.name: Bicycle crunches
exercises.instructions: Elbow to opposite knee alternating, leg extended

exercises.name: Shoulder plank
exercises.instructions: In high plank, tap the opposite shoulder alternating

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
